title: 填写智慧芽 API Key
description: API Key 仅存储在本机，由 WorkBuddy 在连接 MCP 服务时注入到连接 URL 的 apikey 参数中，不会上传到云端。
description_en: The API key is stored only on this device. WorkBuddy injects it into the apikey parameter of the connection URL when connecting to the MCP server and does not upload it to the cloud.
docLabel: 查看 API Key 获取说明

fields.label: 智慧芽 API Key
fields.placeholder: 粘贴你的智慧芽 API Key
fields.description: 请从智慧芽开放平台或企业管理员提供的 MCP/API 凭证中获取。
fields.description_en: Obtain this from the Patsnap Open Platform or the MCP/API credentials provided by your administrator.
